extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Michael attacked with 800m to go on the final Basque climb, barely held off TEUNS Dylan in a sprint after YATES Simon's mid-stage move gained only 4-5 seconds on GC contenders.
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon attacked when ARU crashed, forcing VALVERDE to chase sacrificially despite being 2:58 back on GC.
VALVERDE continued pedaling past the summit to gain time-cut margin, showing 2:41 gap management over passive GC group.
QUINTANA dropped when VALVERDE chased YATES move, revealing weakness when pace lifted unexpectedly mid-stage.
WOODS launched sprint with 800m remaining on uphill finish, earlier than typical for summit finishes in Basque Country.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: exploited ARU crash to attack, showing opportunistic race reading though gained only marginal 4-5 seconds
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: crashed on descent/technical section with STEINER, stayed down indicating significant impact
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: immediately dropped when VALVERDE accelerated to chase YATES, concerning weakness on non-summit acceleration
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: chased despite being 2:58 down, then tactically rode through summit to maximize time-cut buffer
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: went deep early in breakaway then faded badly, poor pacing discipline on mountain stage
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: nearly stole stage from WOODS despite latter's tactical positioning, strong uphill sprint speed
